extraction.one_line_summary: HINDLEY Jai won from massive early breakaway, VINGEGAARD Jonas attacked late to distance POGAČAR by over a minute when defending champion cracked
tactical_patterns: Jumbo-Visma miscalculated allowing 37-rider break with GC threat Hindley to gain huge advantage early stage
Vingegaard attacked solo late without teammates, still distanced Pogačar by 1:38 showing form disparity already emerging
Van Aert contested intermediate sprint against Pedersen despite massive break ahead, revealing green jersey priority over stage control
Pogačar's teammate Yates couldn't pace him back to Vingegaard, exposing UAE team weakness in mountain trains

rider_signals.HINDLEY Jai: positive: recognized as GC threat too late by Jumbo, positioned perfectly in break, showed he'll factor in overall
rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: positive: attacked without team support and still put over a minute into defending champion, ominous form signal
rider_signals.POGAČAR Tadej: negative: cracked when Vingegaard attacked, lost 1:38 and fell to fifth, massive early blow to title defense
rider_signals.JAKOBSEN Fabio: negative: dropped immediately when racing started, suggests poor form and likely time cut struggles ahead
rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: neutral: chased intermediate sprint points aggressively instead of policing break, green jersey tactical priority confirmed
